capabilities: All SQL statements, especially those generated via AI prompts, must use parameterized queries to mitigate SQL injection risks.

procedure.action: Initialize the AI model to output SQL statements with placeholders for parameters by loading environment-specific values from config file; assert all required keys are present via config_validate(); assert config_validation_error_count < 1.

Compose a SQL library that supports parameterized queries, such as PreparedStatement in Java or psycopg2 in Python by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Run static analysis tools to detect non-parameterized SQL statements in the codebase using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Set up automated tests to execute AI-generated SQL with varied inputs and verify no SQL injection occurs using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Log all AI-generated SQL queries and review logs for any anomalies or security breaches using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Ensure all SQL statements generated by AI prompts use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection attacks and maintain database security.
title: Enforce Parameterized Queries for AI-Prompted SQL Statements

failureConditions: SQL injection vulnerabilities are introduced; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Database integrity is compromised; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Sensitive data is exposed to unauthorized users; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: all required keys are present via config_validate()
input/output type contracts match before connecting
successConditions: All AI-generated SQL statements pass static analysis checks for parameterization; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Automated tests confirm no SQL injection vulnerabilities; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Review of logs shows no unauthorized access attempts; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
